userAbout.userDescription: I'm Gabriel Pedro Aurélio, a final-year high school student in the Computer Management course. Aspiring Backend Engineer, IT enthusiast, and naturally curious

userExperience.title: DBA
userExperience.description: A mid-level DBA experienced in managing large-scale environments using PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Redis, with a focus on performance, high availability, and reliable data solutions in enterprise projects.

userExperience.title: Backend Engenner
userExperience.description: A mid-level Backend Engineer experienced in building scalable applications using TypeScript, Node.js, and Angular, with a focus on performance, clean architecture, and reliable solutions in enterprise projects.

userExperience.title: DevOps Engineer
userExperience.description: A mid-level DevOps Engineer focused on automating infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and system reliability. Experienced with cloud environments, containerization, and monitoring solutions to ensure scalable and resilient deployments.

userExperience.title: Cloud Engineer
userExperience.description: A mid-level Cloud Engineer specialized in designing, deploying, and managing cloud infrastructure on major platforms. Focused on scalability, security, and cost optimization in distributed systems.

userExperience.title: AI Engineer
userExperience.description: A mid-level AI Engineer experienced in developing and deploying machine learning models and AI-driven applications. Focused on data pipelines, model training, and integrating AI solutions into production systems.

userAbout.userDescription: I'm Marciano Mavungo, a security enginner specialized in penetration testing. I help individuals uncover and fix weaknesses in their systems, networks and applications by thinking like an attacker.

userExperience.title: Freelancer
userExperience.description: Launched over 3 custom websites for individuals across diverse industries with a 100% client satisfaction rate, and improved website load speeds by up to 60% through optimization and performance tuning using plain vanilla JavaScript.

userExperience.title: Penetration Tester
userExperience.description: Conducted 15+ penetration tests across finance, healthcare, and e-commerce, uncovering critical vulnerabilities and improving system security through detailed reporting and remediation guidance.
